song.title: Precious Precious Blood of Jesus
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Precious, precious blood of Jesus, Shed on Calvary; Shed for rebels, shed for sinners, Shed for thee.
[C] Chorus Precious, precious blood of Jesus Ever flowing free; Oh, believe it; oh, receive it, ’Tis for thee.
[V2] 2) Precious, precious blood of Jesus, Let it make thee whole; Let it flow in mighty cleansing, O’er thy soul.
[v3] 3) Though thy sins Are red like crimson, Deep in scarlet glow, Jesus’ precious blood shall wash thee, White as snow.
[V4] 4) Precious blood that has redeemed us! All the price is paid; Perfect pardon now is offered, Peace is made.
[V5] 5) Now the holiest with boldness We may enter in; For the open fountain cleanseth From all sin.
[V6] 6) Precious blood, by this we conquer In the fiercest fight, Sin and Satan overcoming By its might.
[V7] 7) Precious blood whose full redemption Makes us nigh to God; Precious blood, our way of glory, Praise and laud.
song.author: Frances R. Havergal
